MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-25-2009 IN 206, DEFENDANT ESTATE OF VERONICA TON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/16/09 IS CONTINUED TO 4/27/09 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
